Words.Definition: Able to withstand or recover quickly from difficult conditions.
Words.Example: Our distributed system is resilient to node failures.

Words.Definition: Denoting an operation which can be applied multiple times without changing the result.
Words.Example: Ensure API retry calls are strictly idempotent.

Words.Definition: Lasting for a very short time.
Words.Example: Container local storage is ephemeral unless backed by volumes.
Secrets vault prevents clandestine access to tokens.

Words.Definition: Having a ready insight into and understanding of things; shrewd.
Words.Example: The architect gave a perspicacious solution to the bottleneck.
